---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or a significant addition to an existing one
title: '[skill-request] Brief description'
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this skill solve?
<!-- What question or task would it handle that existing skills don't cover well? -->

## Why doesn't an existing skill cover it?
<!-- Which existing skills did you consider, and why do they fall short? -->

## Proposed scope
<!-- What would the skill cover? What would be explicitly out of scope? -->

## Does it extend an existing skill or stand alone?
<!-- Extension: adds depth to an existing skill's domain -->
<!-- Standalone: covers a domain not currently in the suite -->

## Rough outline
<!-- What sections would SKILL.md have? What reference files would it need? -->

## Are you willing to build it?
<!-- Yes / No / Maybe — no obligation either way -->
